W=29.5 yrs (30) X = 84 yrs Y= 165 yrs Z = 247 yrs </> = 18 yrs a b c ; 12 yr
6th : afflicted 5th lord in the 6th bhava of the annual horoscope with malefic aspects brings
problems for children and activities undertaken makes losses.
7th : 5th lord in 7th bhava of the annual horoscope gives benefits of progeny, marriage of
children etc. during this period one sees their prosperity.
8th : A malefic 5th lord in 8th bhava of paribhraman chart gives problems & pain from children.
Gamblers suffers great financial losses during this period.
9th : A benefic 5th lord without affliction in the 9th bhava of the paribhraman chart indicates
birth of grandchildren, students get excellent results and success in exams.
10th bhava : 5th lord in the 10th of paribhraman chart brings fame or disgrace according to the
good or bad position the planet. Bad and afflicted planet brings loss & hardship in business &
enterprise, death of father or illness to father.
